onboarding.mainMenuDesc: Navigate between system sections using the sidebar. Here you have quick access to all modules.
onboarding.dashboardDesc: View metrics, alerts and overall equipment status in real-time.
onboarding.equipmentDesc: Register and manage all safety equipment. Track expiry dates and inspection history.
onboarding.inspectionsDesc: Record inspections, add photos and digital signature. Track the calendar of pending inspections.
onboarding.alertsDesc: Receive notifications about equipment with expired inspections, expiring certificates and pending maintenance.
onboarding.reportsDesc: Generate detailed reports in PDF and Excel. Filter by period, vessel and status.
onboarding.profileDesc: Access your profile to configure your personal information and system preferences.
onboarding.digitalSignatureDesc:
Important: Set up your digital signature to speed up your inspections!

Go to My Profile → Signature to:

  • Draw your default signature
  • Enable "Sign automatically" to use your signature on all inspections

This saves time and ensures standardization of your reports.
onboarding.readyToStartDesc: You can restart this tour at any time in Settings. Don't forget to set up your digital signature in your profile!
onboarding.welcomeDescription: Maritime Safety Equipment Inspection Management System.
onboarding.tourQuestion: Would you like to take a quick tour of the system? You will learn about:
onboarding.tourItem4: How to set up your digital signature

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.unauthorized: You don't have access to this resource
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
errors.validationError: Please check the information provided and try again
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.genericError: We couldn't complete this action. Please try again.
errors.unknownError: Something unexpected happened. Please try again or contact support.
errors.databaseError: We couldn't access the information right now. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.duplicateEquipmentCode: An equipment with this code already exists. Please use a different code.
errors.duplicateSerialNumber: This serial number is already registered. Check if the equipment already exists in the system.
errors.duplicateShortCode: This short code is already in use. A new one will be generated automatically.
errors.duplicateCategoryName: A category with this name already exists. Please choose another name.
errors.duplicateShipName: A unit with this name already exists. Please choose another name.
errors.duplicateShipCode: A unit with this code already exists. Please choose another code.
errors.duplicateUserShip: This user is already linked to this unit.
errors.duplicateEmail: This email is already being used by another user.
errors.duplicateRecord: This item already exists in the system. Please check the data and try again.
errors.equipmentInUse: This equipment cannot be deleted because it has registered inspections or maintenance records. Remove those records first.
errors.categoryInUse: This category cannot be deleted because it has linked equipment. Move or delete the equipment first.
errors.shipInUse: This unit cannot be deleted because it has linked equipment or users.
errors.userInUse: This user cannot be deleted because they have records in the system.
errors.recordInUse: This item cannot be deleted because it is linked to other data.
errors.accessDenied: You don't have permission to perform this action. Contact an administrator if you need access.
errors.recordNotFound: The item you're looking for was not found or may have been removed.
errors.invalidCredentials: Incorrect email or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.emailNotConfirmed: Your email has not been confirmed yet. Please check your inbox.
errors.userNotFound: We couldn't find a user with this information.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session has expired due to inactivity. Please log in again.
errors.invalidSession: Your session is invalid. Please log in again.
errors.requiredFieldMissing: Some required fields are not filled in. Complete them to continue.
errors.networkError: Connection problem. Check your internet and try again.
errors.noInternet: You're offline. Connect to the internet and try again.
errors.fileTooLarge: The file is too large. Maximum allowed size is 10MB.
errors.invalidFile: This file type is not accepted. Use formats like PDF, JPG, or PNG.
errors.uploadFailed: We couldn't upload the file. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The operation is taking longer than expected. Please try again in a few moments.
errors.serverError: We're experiencing technical issues. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.organizationNotFound: Organization not found. Please log in again.
errors.invalidData: Some of the information provided is incorrect. Please check and try again.
